name: Neiman-Marcus Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and both sugars.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; mix in with flour, blended oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
3. Fold in chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and chopped pecans.
4. Roll into balls and place about two inches apart on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Makes 112 cookies (the recipe may be halved).
